verdict.summary: Guide is useful in spirit but materially misleading for expats because it assumes Cartão de Cidadão, overstates in-person password reset options, contains wrong/unclear service locations, and gives some inaccurate CMD/roaming/appointment advice.

issues.current: «Если потеряли всё — Conservatória/Espaço Cidadão с CC.»
issues.problem: For a Russian-speaking expat audience this is misleading: most foreign residents do not have a Cartão de Cidadão. CC is primarily for Portuguese citizens; foreign residents normally have a título de residência / passport. The guide repeatedly assumes CC as the fallback credential.
issues.suggestion: Write: «Если у вас есть Cartão de Cidadão — можно восстанавливать CMD/доступы с CC и PIN-кодами. Если вы иностранный резидент без CC — идите лично в Espaço Cidadão/IRN/другой уполномоченный balcão с паспортом/карточкой резидента и NIF; процедуры зависят от услуги.»
issues.source: ePortugal / IRN information on Cartão de Cidadão and Chave Móvel Digital

issues.current: «Получить временный пароль на бумаге, сменить после первого входа»
issues.problem: This is likely wrong for Portal das Finanças. AT generally issues/reissues the access password through the official recovery process and sends codes/passwords to the registered tax address or uses verified contacts; a Serviço de Finanças may help request/cancel/update data, but users should not expect to walk out with a temporary AT password printed on paper.
issues.suggestion: Replace with: «В Serviço de Finanças могут помочь подтвердить личность, обновить/исправить контакты или инициировать новый pedido de senha; новый доступ обычно приходит через канал, предусмотренный AT, например SMS при telemóvel fiabilizado или carta para o domicílio fiscal.»
issues.source: Portal das Finanças — Recuperar senha / Pedido de senha

issues.problem: The usual official term is Serviço de Finanças, not «Loja Finanças». «Loja de Cidadão» and «Espaço Cidadão» are different service points and may not provide all AT password operations. The text makes it sound like any Espaço Cidadão can do full AT password recovery.
issues.suggestion: Use: «Serviço de Finanças / balcão da AT» and add: «Перед визитом проверьте на atendimento.portaldasfinancas.gov.pt/SIGA, доступна ли нужная услуга в выбранном balcão.»
issues.source: Autoridade Tributária e Aduaneira; SIGA / marcação de atendimento

issues.problem: Accurate only for people who have a Cartão de Cidadão and know its PINs. It omits the main caveat for foreigners without CC: they cannot use the CC online recovery path and may need an in-person CMD recovery/activation route or other accepted identification.
issues.suggestion: Add immediately after this item: «Если CC нет — этот онлайн-способ не подходит; для иностранцев обычно нужен presencial balcão с паспортом/карточкой резидента и NIF либо другой доступный способ, указанный на autenticacao.gov.pt/ePortugal.»

issues.current: «Если потеряли телефон: лично в Espaço Cidadão / Loja CTT — заменить привязанный номер»
issues.problem: Loja CTT is not generally the standard official channel for changing the CMD phone number. Official CMD activation/recovery channels are listed via Autenticação.gov/ePortugal and commonly include Espaços Cidadão, IRN/Registos, Lojas de Cidadão, consular posts and online/video options depending on case; CTT should not be stated generically without checking the specific service.
issues.suggestion: Write: «лично в уполномоченный balcão CMD — например Espaço Cidadão/Loja de Cidadão/IRN/Registo или консульство; проверьте доступные balcões на autenticacao.gov.pt/ePortugal перед визитом.» Remove «Loja CTT» unless you have a current official page confirming this exact service.
issues.source: Autenticação.gov.pt — Chave Móvel Digital; ePortugal service locations

issues.current: «Espaço Cidadão / Loja CTT / Loja de Cidadão»
issues.problem: Same issue: «Loja CTT» is presented as a generic CMD regeneration location, which is not safely supported. Also «regeneration» is not the usual user-facing term; users normally recover PIN, change contact, activate/reactivate CMD or cancel/deactivate.
issues.suggestion: Replace with: «Espaço Cidadão / Loja de Cidadão / balcões IRN-Registo / consulado português no estrangeiro, conforme disponibilidade indicada no ePortugal/autenticacao.gov.pt.»

issues.current: «CC имеет 3 PIN: Authentication PIN (4 цифры), Signature PIN (4 цифры), Address Change PIN (4 цифры). После 3 неправильных вводов — заблокирован.»
issues.problem: Oversimplified and partly misleading. The CC PIN letter also includes other codes such as cancellation/unblocking-related codes depending on card generation, and procedures differ by PIN/card version. Also this section applies only to Cartão de Cidadão holders, not most Russian expats.
issues.suggestion: Write: «У Cartão de Cidadão есть PIN de autenticação, PIN de assinatura digital и PIN de morada, а также коды из carta PIN / código de cancelamento. После нескольких неверных попыток PIN может быть заблокирован; способ разблокировки зависит от карты и наличия carta PIN/PUK. Для иностранцев без CC этот раздел неприменим.»
issues.source: ePortugal / Autenticação.gov.pt — Cartão de Cidadão PINs

issues.current: «Полностью сбросить (если PIN забыт + заблокирован): Loja CC, ~10 €, в день визита»
issues.problem: The price and same-day promise are not reliably stated. CC PIN recovery/reissue procedures and fees depend on card type, whether the PIN letter/codes exist, whether a second copy is possible, and whether card renewal is needed. «Loja CC» is also not a standard official term.
issues.suggestion: Replace with: «Если PIN/carta PIN потеряны — проверьте на ePortugal/IRN, можно ли pedir segunda via da carta PIN или нужно renovar o Cartão de Cidadão. Стоимость и сроки зависят от случая; не обещайте same-day reset.»
issues.source: ePortugal / IRN — Cartão de Cidadão, carta PIN, renovação

issues.current: «CMD app не работает в роуминге» — телефон должен быть в PT для СМС
issues.problem: False as a general rule. CMD SMS codes can be received abroad if the mobile number/SIM and roaming work. The phone does not have to be physically in Portugal. The problem is usually roaming/SMS delivery by the operator, expired SIM, changed number, or lack of access to the registered number.
issues.suggestion: Write: «Если CMD/SMS не приходит за границей — проверьте roaming, активность SIM, правильный привязанный номер и возможность принимать international SMS. Нахождение телефона в Португалии само по себе не требуется.»
issues.source: Autenticação.gov.pt — Chave Móvel Digital authentication by SMS/security code

issues.current: «Senha bloqueada após 3 tentativas» — заблокирована на 24 часа, потом ещё 3 попытки
issues.problem: This is stated too confidently without an official source. Lockout rules differ between Portal das Finanças, CMD, CC PIN and other services; CC PIN blocking is not the same as temporary web-password throttling.
issues.suggestion: Either cite the exact AT rule or soften: «После нескольких неверных попыток доступ может быть временно заблокирован; следуйте сообщению на экране или используйте Recuperar Senha.»

issues.current: «Настроить CMD биометрию — обходит надобность вводить PIN каждый раз»
issues.problem: Too broad. Biometric confirmation depends on the Autenticação.gov mobile app/device configuration and may not be available for every authentication/signature flow. It should not be presented as eliminating the CMD PIN universally.
issues.suggestion: Write: «Если приложение Autenticação.gov и устройство поддерживают, включите биометрию для подтверждения входа; в некоторых операциях PIN всё равно может потребоваться.»

issues.current: «В Lisboa самое быстрое Espaço Cidadão: Saldanha (Loja de Cidadão Saldanha) и Marvila (Loja de Cidadão das Laranjeiras)»
issues.problem: Geographically and institutionally confusing. Marvila and Laranjeiras are different areas; «Loja de Cidadão das Laranjeiras» is not Marvila. Also claiming they are «the fastest» is unsupported and can become outdated quickly.
issues.suggestion: Replace with: «В Лиссабоне проверяйте ближайшие Espaço Cidadão/Loja de Cidadão и доступные слоты в SIGA/ePortugal; время ожидания постоянно меняется.» If naming locations, list them accurately and separately.

issues.problem: The appointment URL is likely wrong or at least not the standard generic public-service booking reference. For many citizen-service appointments the platform is SIGA, commonly at siga.marcacaodeatendimento.pt; other services use their own booking portals. The 1–2 week estimate is unsupported and varies heavily by city/service.
issues.suggestion: Write: «Запись обычно через SIGA / ePortugal или через специальный портал конкретной услуги; сроки зависят от города и услуги.» Use a current official URL such as «https://siga.marcacaodeatendimento.pt/» where applicable.
issues.source: SIGA — Sistema Integrado de Gestão do Atendimento

issues.current: «Сброс пароля Portal das Finanças и SIA — что делать»
issues.problem: SIA is never defined and no SIA-specific recovery procedure is described. Readers cannot know whether this means AT/Sistema de Identificação e Autenticação, Social Security, customs, or another platform.
issues.suggestion: Define SIA in the title or first paragraph, or remove it if the article is only about Portal das Finanças, CMD and Cartão de Cidadão.

issues.problem: Potentially too specific/outdated. AT access credentials/password rules can change, and not every user-facing description should promise exactly an 8-digit password. The important term is «senha de acesso»/«senha de acesso ao Portal das Finanças».
issues.suggestion: Write more safely: «AT использует senha de acesso для входа в Portal das Finanças» without hardcoding «8-значный», unless you cite the current AT password-rule page.
issues.source: Portal das Finanças — Pedido/Recuperação de senha

issues.problem: This is only the general Portal das Finanças landing page, not the specific official source for password recovery. For a sensitive how-to guide, the source should point to the actual recovery/login/help page where possible.
issues.suggestion: Add a specific official source for «Recuperar Senha» / «Pedido de Senha» on Portal das Finanças, or cite the login page path that exposes «Recuperar Senha».

issues.current: Only generic Portal das Finanças, Autenticação.gov.pt home page, and one ePortugal CC page are cited.
issues.problem: Sources are too generic for several precise claims: CMD PIN recovery, changing CMD phone number, CC PIN unblocking/reset fees, service locations, and appointment platform.
issues.suggestion: Add official pages for: CMD recovery/change contacts, Cartão de Cidadão PIN/carta PIN, SIGA appointment booking, and AT password recovery.
issues.source: Autenticação.gov.pt; ePortugal; IRN; Portal das Finanças; SIGA

missing_topics: Clear caveat that Cartão de Cidadão procedures apply mainly to Portuguese citizens / CC holders, while most Russian expats use passport + residence card instead
Specific distinction between Portal das Finanças password recovery and CMD recovery: CMD can be an alternative login to AT only if already activated and functional
Explanation of «telemóvel fiabilizado» and that AT SMS recovery depends on a verified/registered mobile contact
What to do if the tax address is wrong and the user cannot log in: update domicílio fiscal/contact details through an official AT channel or in person
Official SIGA/ePortugal appointment links and warning that service availability varies by balcão
Specific official source for CC PIN/carta PIN second copy, unblocking and renewal fees
Definition or removal of the unexplained acronym «SIA»
